for entirely by the state while we
haven't seen a funeral for a reigning
monarch in over 50 years Princess
Diana's funeral viewed by over 2.5
billion people worldwide had a direct
cost of about 10 million dollars and
that's just funeral expenses the Bank of
England has over 3.6 billion individual
banknotes in circulation each of which
displays the image of the Queen each
note costs about five cents to produce
so remitting the entire currency stock
would cost close to 200 million dollars
but the UK isn't the only country that
would need to reprint their currency
